# NexusCorp - Corporate Profile & CMS

> A modern, decoupled corporate profile website and Content Management System dashboard built for Nexus Corporation.

## Navigation
- [Home](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/) - Primary landing page with company summary, statistics, and highlights.
- [About Us](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/#about) - Core strategy, vision, and advisory leadership team details.
- [Services](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/#services) - Professional consulting, transformation, financial advisory, and cloud services.
- [Portfolio](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/#portfolio) - Success stories and case studies of our clients.
- [Blog & Articles](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/#blog) - Corporate insights, trends, and financial strategy guides.
- [Contact Us](https://nexuscorp.nexvol.xyz/#contact) - Office locations and contact form for project inquiries.
